title: Ice Poseidon slams stream clippers as ‘leeches’, refuses to pay $400K for clips
summary_full: Kick streamer Ice Poseidon ignited a debate by criticizing 'clippers' who profit from short stream highlights. He argued streamers are the true creators and rejected exorbitant payments for clip creation, fearing it stifles originality. Poseidon believes some creators rely too heavily on clips, impacting genuine content. His stance has divided online opinions.
